sampleRecords.event_description: Contact with objects and equipment, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was aligning a bolt hole to reinstall a control arm on a car. A post jack slipped and cut his left index fingertip, resulting in a partial amputation.

sampleRecords.event_description: Part of occupant s body caught between vehicle and other object in nonroadway transport incident
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was riding in the passenger seat of an industrial cart when their right foot struck a post, resulting in a broken right leg.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slipping
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On January 20, 2022, an employee slipped on ice and fell while making a delivery. The employee suffered a leg/hip injury.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Abdomen, except internal location of diseases or disorders
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was delivering auto parts at a car dealership. There was an attempted robbery, and the employee was shot in the stomach.

sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was switching out an empty storage rack with a full storage rack that she had towed to the production line. The employee began closing the shelves on the empty rack, lowering each shelf, one at a time, starting with the bottom and working her way up.
